title: wedelia helianthoides subsp. ciliata
intro: Wedelia helianthoides subsp. ciliata, also known as the Wedelia or Daisy Tansy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts and oils have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Wedelia helianthoides subsp. ciliata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried powder, allowing for its health benefits to be harnessed through various herbal preparations.
